title: EntitlementProjection
description: Rich entitlement read returned by Commerce-Rails for app-shell initialization and entitlement transitions. Companion to the is_entitled bool gate. Field set is panel-locked per the 2026-06-15 three-architect review (RR B2 amendment): adding new optional fields is non-breaking; renaming or removing a field requires a new dated panel review. Source: commerce-rails v0.2.2, commerce-rails-stripe/src/lib.rs. Source review: REVIEW_quorum-sense_2026-06-15.md. Active handoff: HANDOFF_quorum-sense_2026-06-15.md.

entitled.description: True if the firebase_uid has an active subscription whose plan grants the named app. Mirrors the result of CommerceRails::is_entitled. Apps gate access on this; the hot-path uses is_entitled directly for performance.

checkout_url.description: Static checkout URL configured at the deploy boundary (env CR_CHECKOUT_URL or builder with_checkout_url). Absent when not configured. For dynamic per-customer checkout sessions, call create_checkout_session directly.

portal_url.description: Static billing-portal URL configured at the deploy boundary (env CR_PORTAL_URL or builder with_portal_url). Absent when not configured. For dynamic per-customer portal sessions, call create_portal_session directly.

signup_url.description: Static signup URL configured at the deploy boundary (env CR_SIGNUP_URL or builder with_signup_url). Apps show this to not-yet-entitled users. Absent when not configured.

next_renewal.description: Timestamp of the next subscription renewal in ISO 8601. Absent when there is no stored subscription projection for the customer (e.g. user has never subscribed).

plan_label.description: Lowercase plan label matching BillingPlan::as_str(). Absent when no stored projection.
